      -2260159403182301993L

        • affectedRow
          MOTableRow affectedRow
        • columnIndex
          int columnIndex
        • type

    • Class org.snmp4j.agent.mo.MOTableRowEvent

      class MOTableRowEvent extends DeniableEventObject implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      5846054060591503486L

      • Serialized Fields

        • numberOfConsecutiveEventsOfSameOrigin
          int numberOfConsecutiveEventsOfSameOrigin
          The number of events that will follow from the same origin (and source trigger) if MOTableRowEvent.sendNextEventsOfSameOrigin is set to true.
          Since:
          3.0
        • originType
          MOTableRowEvent.OriginType originType
          Specifies the origin type of the change. Default is MOTableRowEvent.OriginType.external.
          Since:
          3.3.0
        • preparedChanges
          MOTableRow preparedChanges
        • row
          R extends MOTableRow row
        • sendNextEventsOfSameOrigin
          boolean sendNextEventsOfSameOrigin
          Some events like MOTableRowEvent.EXISTS are fired for more than one row at the same time. If the MOTableRowListener is interested an all those events, then this attribute has to be set to true.
          Since:
          3.0
        • table
          MOTable<R extends MOTableRow,? extends MOColumn,? extends MOTableModel<R extends MOTableRow>> table
        • type
          int type
        • vetoColumn
          int vetoColumn

    • Class org.snmp4j.agent.mo.MOValueValidationEvent

          org.snmp4j.smi.Variable newValue
        • oldValue

        • validationStatus
